name: PaylinkOps
description: A minimalist merchant operations console for AI agents and crypto-native teams that creates MoonPay deposit links, tracks incoming payments, reconciles receipts, and prepares treasury sweeps using MoonPay CLI as the real money rail.
problemStatement: Crypto-native operators need a local-first way to create paylinks, observe payment arrival, reconcile receipts, and keep a durable audit trail without building a full accounting stack.
conversationLog: See submission/demo-script.md and public repo history for the concise build narrative.
